title: Grilled Octopus with Mediterranean Salad
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish that combines the taste of the Mediterranean with the tenderness of grilled octopus. This recipe is perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Season the octopus with salt and black pepper.
Grill the octopus for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
Let the octopus rest for 5 minutes before slicing into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, lemon juice, garlic, and olive oil.
Toss the salad to combine and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
To serve, place a portion of the salad on a plate and top with sliced octopus.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve immediately.
